creator: uyamba@gmail.com
text:
After upgrading some ports I got this error when starting 'big' programs (sylpheed, pidgin, firefox...):

% sylpheed
Fatal error 'Cannot allocate red zone for initial thread' at line 384 in file /usr/src/lib/libthr/thread/thr_init.c (errno = 12)
Fatal error 'Cannot allocate red zone for initial thread' at line 384 in file /usr/src/lib/libthr/thread/thr_init.c (errno = 12)
Fatal error 'Cannot allocate red zone for initial thread' at line 384 in file /usr/src/lib/libthr/thread/thr_init.c (errno = 12)
Fatal error 'Cannot allocate red zone for initial thread' at line 384 in file /usr/src/lib/libthr/thread/thr_init.c (errno = 12)
..

When only kernel and world were upgraded from 6.2 to 7.0 all works, problem appear when some ports recompiled.
